name: WESTERN DIGITAL CORP
summary: Western Digital Corporation, founded in 1970 and headquartered in San Jose, California, is a leading developer, manufacturer, and provider of data storage devices and solutions based on hard disk drive (HDD) technology. The company serves Cloud, Client, and Consumer end markets under the Western Digital and WD brands, offering enterprise HDDs for cloud data centers, high-performance HDDs for desktop and notebooks, and external storage products for consumers.

products.name: Capacity Enterprise HDDs
products.description: High-capacity HDDs for cloud data centers and smart video systems offering reliability, scalability, and low total cost of ownership.

products.name: Client HDDs
products.description: High-performance HDD solutions for desktops and notebooks with low cost per gigabyte, quiet acoustics, and low power consumption.

products.name: Consumer External Storage
products.description: HDD external storage products sold under the Western Digital and WD brands through retail and channel routes to market.

products.name: ePMR Drives
products.description: Enhanced perpendicular magnetic recording HDDs as part of multi-year high-capacity product roadmap.

products.name: OptiNAND Drives
products.description: HDDs integrating NAND flash as part of Western Digital's high-capacity product portfolio.

products.name: UltraSMR Drives
products.description: Shingled magnetic recording HDDs in Western Digital's high-capacity drive portfolio.

products.name: Triple Stage Actuator Drives
products.description: HDDs featuring triple stage actuators for improved precision, part of the high-capacity product roadmap.
